synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-28013 Oracle Linux 9 pcp bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28013
description:
[6.3.7-5.0.3]
- pmlogger_daily default xz compression changed to level 3 [Orabug: 38674828]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28013

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-28013.html
